tasks.label: Compile and Run any .cpp file in Command panel
args: start cmd.exe /k chcp 65001 ^& cd /d ${fileDirname} ^&^& g++ ${fileBasename} -o ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe ^&^& ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe ^& pause

tasks.label: Compile and Run any .cpp file (auto-close window)
Start All MCP Servers
tasks.command: npx -y @upstash/context7-mcp@latest & npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking & npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory & npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem C:/Users/muaro/Documents/GitHub/Learning-assistent & npx -y qodo-mcp-server

tasks.label: Compile and Run SFML .cpp file
tasks.command: $projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent (Split-Path -Parent '${fileDirname}'); if (Test-Path "$projectRoot/src") { $projectRoot } else { $projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent '${fileDirname}'; if (Test-Path "$projectRoot/src") { $projectRoot } else { $projectRoot = '${fileDirname}' } }; Set-Location -LiteralPath $projectRoot; chcp 65001 >$null; $sourceFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Filter *.cpp | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; g++ $sourceFiles -Iinclude -IC:/msys64/ucrt64/include -LC:/msys64/ucrt64/lib -o bin/main.exe -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -lsfml-audio; if ($?) { & ./bin/main.exe }

tasks.label: Compile and Run Single SFML .cpp file
Run Java Project (IntelliJ-style) - PC VERSION
tasks.command: $currentDir = '${fileDirname}'; $projectRoot = $currentDir; while ($projectRoot -and !(Test-Path "$projectRoot/src")) { $projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $projectRoot; if ($projectRoot -eq (Split-Path -Parent $projectRoot)) { $projectRoot = $currentDir; break } }; if (!(Test-Path "$projectRoot/src")) { $projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $currentDir }; Write-Host "Project Root: $projectRoot" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Set-Location -LiteralPath $projectRoot; if (!(Test-Path 'bin')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'bin' -Force | Out-Null }; chcp 65001 >$null; Write-Host 'Compiling...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $sourceFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Filter *.java -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; javac -encoding UTF-8 -d bin $sourceFiles; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Running Main...' -ForegroundColor Green; java -cp bin Main } else { Write-Host 'Compilation failed!' -ForegroundColor Red }

tasks.label: Run Java Project (IntelliJ-style) - LAPTOP VERSIO
tasks.command: $currentDir = '${fileDirname}'; $projectRoot = $currentDir; while ($projectRoot -and !(Test-Path "$projectRoot/src")) { $projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $projectRoot; if ($projectRoot -eq (Split-Path -Parent $projectRoot)) { $projectRoot = $currentDir; break } }; if (!(Test-Path "$projectRoot/src")) { $projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $currentDir }; Write-Host "Project Root: $projectRoot" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Set-Location -LiteralPath $projectRoot; if (!(Test-Path 'bin')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'bin' -Force | Out-Null }; chcp 65001 >$null; Write-Host 'Compiling...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $sourceFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Filter *.java -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; javac --enable-preview --release 24 -encoding UTF-8 -d bin $sourceFiles; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Running Main...' -ForegroundColor Green; java --enable-preview -cp bin Main } else { Write-Host 'Compilation failed!' -ForegroundColor Red }
